Off Calendar Dec-12-2017 Continued To Mar-13-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Petition To Approve Comprimise Of Pending Action
Off Calendar Nov-28-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Pending Action of a Person with a Disability.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Matthew D. Davis, Esq. appeared for petitioner James Murray, the Guardina ad Litem for Tyler Murray. Neither James Murray nor Tyler Murray were present at this morning's hearing.
Order waiving the appearance of Messrs. Murray & Murray at today's proceedings was filed on November 21, 2017.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the compromise is approved as follows:

Settlement Amount - $1,000,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $136,145.00.
Medical Bills - $257,487.79.
Costs - $6,367.21.

The entire balance of $600,000.00 shall be deposited into the Tyler Murray Special Needs Trust, as described in Attachment 7c(2)(b) of the Order Approving the Compromise.

Order Approving the Compromise of a Pending Action of a Person with a Disability was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter is CONTINUED to January 23, 2018 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for Progress Report re: Funding of the Special Needs Trust.
